title: Solo.io Gloo Portal Usage Plan
description: A usage plan that defines rate limiting policies, quotas, and access levels for API products in the Gloo developer portal.

id.description: Unique identifier for the usage plan.

requestsPerUnit.description: Number of allowed requests per time unit.

rateLimitPolicy.description: Rate limiting configuration for this plan.

apiProducts.description: List of API product IDs available under this plan.
